data.name: Gangbanged by Orcs and Goblins!
data.detailed_description:
Description:

Step into the gritty, unforgiving world of "Gangbanged by Orcs and Goblins!" A visually stunning visual novel that immerses you in a post-apocalyptic wasteland, where survival is a constant struggle against ruthless foes and harsh conditions.

In this narrative-driven adventure, you take on the role of Alyssa, one of the few remaining survivors in a world overrun by marauding goblins and orcs. Your journey will test not only your physical prowess but also your moral compass as you navigate through a world where the line between right and wrong is blurred.

Forge alliances, make difficult choices, and fight tooth and nail to protect what little you have left. But be warned, danger lurks around every corner, and the path to survival is fraught with peril.

Prepare to be swept away by a tale of courage, sacrifice, and the indomitable human spirit. Will you emerge victorious, or will you succumb to the merciless forces that seek to destroy you?

Features

  • Stunning HD renders bring the post-apocalyptic world to vivid life, with breathtaking attention to detail.
  • Immerse yourself in an intricate storyline filled with twists, turns, and morally ambiguous decisions that shape the outcome of your journey.
  • Explore a diverse cast of characters, each with their own motivations and agendas, as you navigate through a world on the brink of collapse.
  • Experience intense, explicit scenes that add depth and realism to the narrative, pushing the boundaries of storytelling in the visual novel genre.
  • Enjoy the convenience of single-handed gameplay, allowing you to immerse yourself fully in the experience without any distractions.

data.short_description: Dive into "Gangbanged by Orcs and Goblins!" and experience an unforgettable journey in a world where survival is paramount.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo E4700
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice: Legal Information: All images and artworks featured in the game are objects of intellectual property and are protected by copyright. The developer holds full and exclusive rights to commercially utilize the aforementioned artworks provided by the artist, within the context of creating and distributing this game.
